Settlement

Instant

Due Diligence

AI Native

Governance

On-chain

Mission Briefing

Addressing the Systemic Gaps in Venture Capital

Centralized Venture Capital ecosystems have long struggled with structural inefficiencies: opaque investment criteria, restricted access for retail participants, and decision-making processes that concentrate power within small, homogeneous networks.

These shortcomings disproportionately affect founders from underrepresented communities, whose funding prospects are shaped more by personal connections than by the merit of their ventures.

AURA3 reengineers the funding pipeline from the ground up by combining on-chain token governance via ERC-20 smart contracts, an off-chain FinScope AI engine for risk assessment, and a milestone-gated treasury release mechanism.

The Centralization Gap

Traditional venture capital is a black box. Opaque criteria, restricted access, and archaic manual processing stifle global innovation.

System Inefficiency Detected

Gated Access

Only 0.1% of global investors have access to tier-1 venture opportunities, creating an artificial scarcity of capital flows.

Opaque Logic

Investment decisions are made behind closed doors with no verifiable data trail or objective performance metrics.

Latency Issues

Settlement and due diligence take months, not seconds. Capital is trapped in legal and bureaucratic friction.

The Journey of a Proposal

From a single vision to a fully funded decentralized project. Simple, transparent, autonomous.

STEP 01
01

The Spark

A founder submits a proposal with verifiable project data and initial technical milestones.

STEP 02
02

AI Validation

FinScope AI analyzes the data for risk, ROI, and market fit, generating a trust score.

STEP 03
03

Consensus

DAO holders vote based on AI insights. Smart contracts ensure fair, weighted distribution.

STEP 04
04

Milestones

Treasury funds unlock automatically as the founder completes on-chain project goals.

AURA3 Architecture Stream

Neural Feature Matrix

Scroll through the live architecture lens connecting on-chain governance, AI analysis, and programmable execution.

Layer 1

Deterministic Governance Engine

Proposal votes execute with transparent on-chain state transitions, keeping settlement logic auditable and deterministic.

typescript
const proposalState = await ventureDao.proposals(id)
if (proposalState.forVotes > proposalState.againstVotes) {
  await ventureDao.executeProposal(id)
}
settlement status: executed
$ node aura3-runtime --sync
Layer 2

AI Due-Diligence Pipeline

FinScope routes startup documents through a structured analysis flow to generate risk, market, and recommendation signals.

http
POST /api/startups/{id}/documents/upload
POST /api/startups/{id}/analyze
GET  /api/startups/{id}/report/status
  => { status: "complete", analysis: {...} }
$ node aura3-runtime --sync
Layer 3

Investor Exit Liquidity Controls

Founder-configured exit windows lock valuation and liquidity pool rules, enabling programmable investor exits.

solidity
await startupContract.openExit(
  parseEther(exitValuationEth),
  { value: parseEther(poolDepositEth) }
)
investors can call: exit()
$ node aura3-runtime --sync
Layer 4

Multi-Layer Security Surface

Input guardrails, role-based access control, and wallet-signed transactions protect user flows across frontend and backend.

javascript
if (isPromptBlocked(question)) {
  return { status: 400, detail: 'Blocked by safety policy' }
}
require(msg.sender == founder, 'Unauthorized')
$ node aura3-runtime --sync
AURA3

The first truly autonomous capital intelligence protocol. Powered by Ethereum and proprietary sovereign intelligence.
